subject: Template for select service from Ingress
commit_message:
Template for select service from Ingress

Common template for getting service hostname
from cluster IP or ingress controller depending
on the service configuration

Issue-ID: OOM-2341
Change-Id: I7d0dd8665c0c70dc6238f30acee140c2dd912b78
Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>

entries.message:
